title: Stellar Horizons
description: Stellar Horizons is a Cobblemon server. This is the modpack for that server.
body:
### **Stellar Horizons** started as a Star Academy server but after months of gameplay and developing an amazing community, we are moving on to our very own modpack.

**Introducing the Stellar Horizons Season 3 Modpack!**

**Modpack Features:**

- Mega Evolutions, Dynamax, Gigantamax, Z-Moves, Terastallization (Mega Showdown)
- Alpha Pokemon (Cobblemon Alpha Project)
- Quests (FTB Quests + Cobblemon Quests)
- Instanced Loot (Lootr)
- Pokemon Dolls (Pokeblocks)
- Xaero's Minimap/Worldmap
- Camerapture
- Exposure
- Waterframes
- More Biomes! (Biomes O' Plenty)
- More Food! (CobbleCuisine + Farmer's Delight)
- More blocks and furniture to decorate and build with! (Another Furniture + CobbleFurnies)
- And tons more!

Includes [AllTheMons](https://modrinth.com/datapack/allthemons), [MysticMons](https://modrinth.com/datapack/mysticmons), and tons of other resource packs to add on to gameplay!
